summary: Comprehensive testing of RifaFacil after modular refactoring. Backend split from 1761-line monolith into modules (auth, raffles, payments, utils). All 25 backend tests PASSED. Frontend fully functional with login, registration, dashboard, raffle creation, and public raffle pages working correctly.

minor.issue: Health check returns 'v1.0' in utils.py but server.py shows v2.0. Minor version inconsistency.
Returns 503 when MERCADOPAGO_ACCESS_TOKEN not configured (expected behavior)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/register - Creates new user with token
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Returns token for valid credentials
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Returns 401 for invalid password
Backend: POST /api/auth/login - Returns 401 for non-existent email
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user info with valid token
Backend: POST /api/raffles - Creates raffle with auth
Backend: DELETE /api/raffles/{id} - Deletes raffle and verifies 404
Frontend: Login page with Google OAuth and email/password
Frontend: Registration with data-testid selectors works
Frontend: Dashboard shows user info and stats after login
Frontend: Create raffle page accessible from dashboard
Frontend: Public raffle page shows ticket grid
Frontend: Ticket selection highlights selected tickets
Frontend: Payment dialog shows MercadoPago as default option
critical_code_review_comments: Modular structure well organized: auth.py, raffles.py, payments.py, utils.py under /routes
All routes properly prefixed with /api for Kubernetes ingress
MongoDB _id excluded in all find queries using {'_id': 0}
JWT authentication working correctly with Bearer token
Public raffle endpoint correctly excludes preselected_winner field
Minor: utils.py health check says v1.0, server.py shows v2.0
test_credentials: Multiple unique test accounts created during testing with TEST_ prefix
seed_data_creation: Test raffle created with share_code VAHCJV7P for public page testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored from monolith to modular structure. All routes working: auth (register/login/me/google), raffles (CRUD/spin/winner), payments (mercadopago/stripe/paypal/cash), utils (upload/stats/my-tickets). MercadoPago returns 503 when not configured (expected). Frontend TypeScript types added in /types/index.ts. All data-testid attributes present for testing.

features_verified.raffles_module: Full CRUD, spin wheel, preselect winner, assign tickets, cash orders
features_verified.payments_module: MercadoPago, Stripe, PayPal, Cash endpoints (returns 503 when not configured)
features_verified.utils_module: Health check, image upload, my-tickets, stats
features_verified.frontend_pages: Landing, Login, Register, Dashboard, Create Raffle, Public Raffle, Payment Dialog
